description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa upholstered in black leather with a sleek, boxy silhouette. The seat and backrest feature deep, square tufting, giving the surface a plush, quilted appearance. The armrests are straight, wide, and extend to the same height as the backrest, creating a uniform, geometric profile. The sofa stands on four slender, cylindrical metal legs, slightly angled outward for stability and a contemporary touch. The back and sides are fully upholstered in the same black leather, maintaining a consistent look from all angles. The overall design is minimalist and stylish, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or modern apartments.
description: A sleek, black leather two-seater sofa with deep tufting, straight armrests, and slim metal legs, exuding a modern, minimalist style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two seat and back cushions with deep square tufting, straight armrests, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's boxy profile, straight armrest, and the depth of the seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, fully upholstered back and the alignment of the armrests with the backrest.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the boxy profile and straight armrest, with visible seat depth and tufted cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two individual seat cushions and two back cushions, all attached and uniform in size, with deep square tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at the same height as the backrest, wide and fully upholstered in black leather, with a minimalist design.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, cylindrical metal legs positioned at the corners, slightly angled outward, with a metallic finish and exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest, continuous across the width, with deep square tufting and attached cushions.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid black leather with a quilted, tufted pattern forming a grid of squares on the seat and backrest.
